name: Airbnb Cozy
description: Warm and friendly layout utilizing bold cards, rounded buttons, and distinctive circular-style typography.
promptBlock: Apply Airbnb's design guidelines. Foreground text should be #222222. The brand color is warm rose-red (#ff385c) used for call-to-actions, icons, and highlights. Cards must feature large border-radius (16px), soft grey border lines (#dddddd), and highly structured margins. Buttons should have full round corners or 24px pill radius. Ensure search bar or hero input modules look friendly and cozy.
